title: Hide Option for Main Table View

posts.author: nmalexandersen (Nils Morten Alexandersen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all, and hope your are all doing great.
In case this question has been raised earlier, I apologise

If I am not mistaken or misinformed, the Main Table View will contain every Column created in a board. If you try to hide a column, the option you get is to create a new view …

We (and I am sure this applies to more than us) have stuff in the Main Table view that we don’t want normal users to see.

Can we make the Main Table View unelectable for normal users, or hidden for normal users ?
It would sure make our project easier to implement.

Any fix or thoughts ?

Kind regards Nils

posts.author: nmalexandersen (Nils Morten Alexandersen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please add the possibility to Hide the Main Table view for normal users, or make is unselectable for normal users. My users simply get really confused when they for some reason select the Main Table view … and that results in a lot of calls and emails asking … what the f(/$&&% is going on ..

Apart from that … there is also the fact that the Main Table view may contain stuff that we do not want normal users to see.

Hope this can be addressed soon.

Kind regards Nils

posts.author: pjtgrizzly (Reid)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree. If you can’t save filters to the main table view you at least should be able to 1) hide it and/or 2) rename it even if you can’t delete it.

posts.author: Brianne (Brianne Hansen)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love permissions for certain views! Definitely +1 on renaming the main table or hiding it. I

posts.author: brianjw (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Users see “Main Table” and think that’s where they are supposed to be. For some reason, we can’t rename it, we can’t hide it, and we can’t add saved sorts, saved filters, or choose whether to hide certain columns. Its only purpose seems to be acting as the “full database” of the board and that is not something regular users need to see. It just creates confusion.

+1 for the idea to let us hide the Main Table view. Or, at least allow us the same options as any other table view.

posts.author: DrewLeFever (Drew LeFever)
posts.cookedHtml:
100% agreed! We have the same usecase – the Main Table is the “full database” but no one team will ever need to see the entire database. Each team has their own view, and having the Main Table visible to them causes confusion.

Being able to hide (for normal users), rename, or change the order of the views would be great!

posts.author: hobbit (wayne giles)
posts.cookedHtml: surely this is not a difficult option to add.

posts.author: notjulian (julian)
posts.cookedHtml:
You’re right. This would likely be a simple addition however Monday clearly doesn’t have the desire to add it.

It’s a sales tactic. This is an intentional dark pattern intended to coerce users into subscribing to the higher tiered plans.

posts.author: Lucas2 (Lucas Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: Soo frustrating… Every time I make progress on what I actually want to do, I run into stupid limitations like this. I don’t think there’s a way around this one. Monday is really customizable, but at the same time it’s not AT ALL

posts.author: PGI (Jennifer Earp)
posts.cookedHtml: It seems like the “Main” table should be a Developers Table and lockable as such. One fat finger and the project is jeopardized.

posts.author: delia (Délia Figueira)
posts.cookedHtml: Totally agree !

posts.author: Jennifer (Jennifer Murray)
posts.cookedHtml: Is this something we can get added in Monday? If we can’t hide the Main Table then at least the option to rename it.

posts.author: Hannah_Albert (Hannah Albert)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Monday is there a feature to hid tab views in a board like those above are asking for? My team would love this as well

posts.author: MGrabosk (Michael Grabosky)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree. The ability for other views is great but users still tend to go to the main view (and mess it up) even if you made another view first in line. Would love it if monday could enable us to lock down the main view!

posts.author: jrhams (Jeff)
posts.cookedHtml: Up vote. If we have to save filters to a new view, you should be able to hide the Main Table.

posts.author: Aedrei (aedrei)
posts.cookedHtml:
Upvoting as well. Why is this not a basic feature? I’m happy that we can make other views our “main” view now, but why can’t we hide or rename THAT view? Surely is confusing if the “main view” tab is not the main view.

Kind of makes the view tabs somewhat unusable for a team. A PM or ops person can figure this out if they’re in Monday.com all day but I need this to be crystal clear to everyone.

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml: Even at the highest tiered plan, enterprise, you cannot do this.

posts.author: MattHTAWS (Matthew Higgins)
posts.cookedHtml: Bump on this also please, we have a number of different views and all of our configuration sits within the Main table and we do not want users to access this area, only our admins.

posts.author: sholston (Sam H)
posts.cookedHtml:
Bump on this. We’re evaluating the enterprise plan and ability to control this is extremely important for our customer-facing teams.

The risk of them editing core customer data tables (via main-tables) is far too great. It should be a simple ‘hide view’ button. Most CRMs have this functionality.

posts.author: zperp (Zach Perpich)
posts.cookedHtml:
Feature Request: Ability to hide the “Main Table” view

I feel that having the ability to hide the “Main Table” view on boards would be extremely beneficial to all users. Having the Main Table view causes unnecessary confusion and is quite distracting - It also doesn’t help that it is named “Main Table” and cannot be renamed.

posts.author: zperp (Zach Perpich)
posts.cookedHtml:
Feature Request: Ability to hide the “Main Table” view

I feel that having the ability to hide the “Main Table” view on boards would be extremely beneficial to all users. Having the Main Table view causes unnecessary confusion and is quite distracting - It also doesn’t help that it is named “Main Table” and cannot be renamed.

posts.author: zperp (Zach Perpich)
posts.cookedHtml:
Feature Request: Ability to hide the “Main Table” view

I feel that having the ability to hide the “Main Table” view on boards would be extremely beneficial to all users. Having the Main Table view causes unnecessary confusion and is quite distracting - It also doesn’t help that it is named “Main Table” and cannot be renamed.

posts.author: jmcquillin (James McQuillin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Appears to be in the works via “Private views” according to this topic

Lock views Feature requests
Hi all In several of our boards, we have set up custom views so that only the columns we want our users to interact with are visible. If they flip to the ‘main table’ view, it includes a bunch of columns that ordinary users of that board will not understand or use (in some cases they contain info necessary to make certain automations work, for example). We desperately need a way to hide the ‘main table’ view. I am aware that we can set a different view as the default, but there is no way to dr…

posts.author: jmcquillin (James McQuillin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Appears to be a roadmap item a la “Private Views” according to this topic:

Lock views Feature requests
Hi all In several of our boards, we have set up custom views so that only the columns we want our users to interact with are visible. If they flip to the ‘main table’ view, it includes a bunch of columns that ordinary users of that board will not understand or use (in some cases they contain info necessary to make certain automations work, for example). We desperately need a way to hide the ‘main table’ view. I am aware that we can set a different view as the default, but there is no way to dr…

posts.author: Amalie (Amalie Vennike)
posts.cookedHtml:
This feature (option to hide main table) is really a need to have.

Is there any news on whether this feature is on its way?

posts.author: ESleep (Ryleigh Mahaffee)
posts.cookedHtml: Our company really needs this filter. We have to share live updates with all 15 of our customers so that they can track production timelines and tracking. We do not want them to be able to see who else we are doing business with. The “shareable” link does not work for this option because it seems to refresh every 15 seconds and does not allow them to search or interact with product lines. The main table being able to be hidden would help since we could give our customers guest access to view only items they are assigned to. Right now the main table just hides the task but not the customer names since they are groups.

posts.author: nkern (Nick Kern)
posts.cookedHtml: Any update to the timeline on this? This along with hiding views in general is a critical feature that has been requested for years.

posts.author: amybronstein (Amy Bronstein)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone! Amy here from the monday.com team Thank you so much for your patience and for continuing to share your feedback around hiding the Main Table view feature.

We wanted to share a quick update: this request is still strongly under consideration for the second half of the year, and your feedback continues to play a big role in those discussions. Other priorities (like the subitem under subitem request with almost 600 votes) took precedence earlier this year, but we’re excited to keep pushing this forward.

We really appreciate your input, it helps us prioritize what matters most to you! We’ll be sure to keep you updated as things progress!

posts.author: MRad (M Rad)
posts.cookedHtml: Good to know there’s progress. I’ll note though that there are numerous threads requesting this, so the total number of votes is much higher. And Monday often closes threads when the actual feature request is only partially implemented, such as the “Lock views” request which had 372 votes and was closed without the main table view being included in the solution, despite the loud comments focusing on this.

posts.author: Cyrille (L)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello there, would it include the ability to hide any view or just the main board view? I really hope it is any view because it would enable us to have multiple dev views and juste 1 or 2 views for the end user per board.

posts.author: inspiredearth (Jonathan)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s nice to learn this is pending implementation

As it stands, the “Main table” is a close contender for being the main annoyance in the many Monday.com usability issues I face each day.

Context (which I am sure mirrors that of many other Monday customers) — None of our members need nor want to see that table, except me (the one doing the CRM development / maintenance). Yet all members see it, inadvertently end up on it, and ask what it’s for, etc. It has a LOT of columns they don’t require nor understand.

I look forward to the day the Main table can be demoted to a background (and ideally hidden) table.

posts.author: inspiredearth (Jonathan)
posts.cookedHtml:
This has already been requested, in a long standing (Nov 2020) post.

Please cast your votes there.

Hide Option for Main Table View Feature requests
Hello all, and hope your are all doing great. In case this question has been raised earlier, I apologise If I am not mistaken or misinformed, the Main Table View will contain every Column created in a board. If you try to hide a column, the option you get is to create a new view … We (and I am sure this applies to more than us) have stuff in the Main Table view that we don’t want normal users to see. Can we make the Main Table View unelectable for normal users, or hidden for normal users ? …

posts.author: Fentor (Julian L)
posts.cookedHtml:
This feature would also help our users a lot in understanding and working with Monday.

Best example (which also annoyes myself): A user receives a notification. User clicks on the notifcation which was for example the mentioning of said user in an update. Where do they land when clicking on the notification? I the update section of the element in the Main View Table insted of the View that i made for everyone. This behaviour alone leads to so much confusion and i would love to see it resolved!

Thanks

posts.author: Kasper (Jesse Churchill)
posts.cookedHtml: Highly agree, alternatively enable the “save to view” feature on the main view.

posts.author: mattczh (Matthew Chan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please strongly consider this - as the champion for the Monday CRM solution this is a major roadblock for any serious enterprise considering this. It essentially causes the system to not be able to encrypt raw data for users without totally breaking equations and automations.

Alternatively just add a board level permission to literally remove the cosmetic button to access the main table view…

posts.author: Flower9991 (Daniel James Kendall)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any update as to when this will be implemented? If it was under strong consideration for Q2 25 but we are now in Q3 will it be ready soon?

posts.author: suzzanecastro (Suzzane)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates with this feature?

posts.author: Fentor (Julian L)
posts.cookedHtml: Any update on this topic?

posts.author: kasperhusted (Kasper Husted)
posts.cookedHtml: A bump here: When can we expect this to be deployed (and in what form?)

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello everyone–good news! We successfully prioritized this request and we’re happy to share that it is now in development. While we cannot share the exact release date just yet, it should be released in the following couple of months!

posts.author: Tom-CXmonday (Tom)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all! Following Shannon’s last update here, I’m excited to share with you that the feature is now in advanced stages of being gradually released to all accounts and plans

image611×398 46.8 KB

Here is the full article for you to learn more on this new capability: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360001267945-The-board-views

Thank you for continuing to communicate your needs to us here Looking forward to hearing what you think.

posts.author: Rasmus7700 (Rasmus Balle)
posts.cookedHtml: But why is this not working in the iPad app?
